title: Will David Crowley be the Democratic nominee for Governor in Wisconsin?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 20%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: David Crowley is not currently a well-known figure in Wisconsin politics, and there is no evidence in the search results indicating that he is a prominent candidate or has made significant moves to position himself as the Democratic nominee. The absence of direct mentions of Crowley in reputable news sources suggests he is not a frontrunner. The reference class for underdog candidates in state-lev
key_drivers: Lack of media presence or coverage of David Crowley
No indication of strong grassroots support or endorsements
No prior political prominence in Wisconsin
reference_classes: Incumbent base rate for non-incumbents in gubernatorial races
